'''âb-v-f-r''' ('''kabavferoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:foin|foin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foin|foin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-v-f-r
|-
! Lemma
| kabavferoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibavferoko|thibavferoko]] || [[word:jibavferoko|jibavferoko]] || [[word:shibavferoko|shibavferoko]] || [[word:kibavferoko|kibavferoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubavferoko|thuthubavferoko]] || [[word:jujubavferoko|jujubavferoko]] || [[word:shushubavferoko|shushubavferoko]] || [[word:kukubavferoko|kukubavferoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubavferoko|thubavferoko]] || [[word:jubavferoko|jubavferoko]] || [[word:shubavferoko|shubavferoko]] || [[word:kubavferoko|kubavferoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubavferoko|thubavferoko]] || [[word:jubavferoko|jubavferoko]] || [[word:shubavferoko|shubavferoko]] || [[word:kubavferoko|kubavferoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebavferoko|thebavferoko]] || [[word:jebavferoko|jebavferoko]] || [[word:shebavferoko|shebavferoko]] || [[word:kebavferoko|kebavferoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobavferoko|thothobavferoko]] || [[word:jojobavferoko|jojobavferoko]] || [[word:shoshobavferoko|shoshobavferoko]] || [[word:kokobavferoko|kokobavferoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobavferoko|thobavferoko]] || [[word:jobavferoko|jobavferoko]] || [[word:shobavferoko|shobavferoko]] || [[word:kobavferoko|kobavferoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobavferoko|thobavferoko]] || [[word:jobavferoko|jobavferoko]] || [[word:shobavferoko|shobavferoko]] || [[word:kobavferoko|kobavferoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbavferoko|thĂŠbavferoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbavferoko|jĂŠbavferoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbavferoko|shĂŠbavferoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbavferoko|kĂŠbavferoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabavferoko|thathabavferoko]] || [[word:jajabavferoko|jajabavferoko]] || [[word:shashabavferoko|shashabavferoko]] || [[word:kakabavferoko|kakabavferoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabavferoko|thabavferoko]] || [[word:jabavferoko|jabavferoko]] || [[word:shabavferoko|shabavferoko]] || [[word:kabavferoko|kabavferoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabavferoko|thabavferoko]] || [[word:jabavferoko|jabavferoko]] || [[word:shabavferoko|shabavferoko]] || [[word:kabavferoko|kabavferoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
